name: apt-transport-https
title: apt-transport-https
description:
transitional package for https support
This is a dummy transitional package - https support has been moved into
the apt package in 1.5. It can be safely removed.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use apt-transport-https because transitional package for https support.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use apt-transport-https as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair apt-transport-https with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `apt-transport-https --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
